$comment: v1 — two-track itemization: track=tree is deterministic; track=legend is hunted, never on the tree

stationWorkId.description: where it's crafted; omit for hand-craft

unlock.description: tree: discovery by material pickup / tier. legend: fragments.

fragments.description: legend only: recipe fragment count, PLACED in the world, never rolled

ritual.description: legend finals: the craft is an event

eventMaterial.description: at least one input sourced from an event (storm carcass, seasonal spawn, expedition)
